summary: iter249 testing complete - Manager Workflow desktop panel (5 tabs: PTO/Swap/Callout/Chat/Config), MyEcho mobile extensions (Swap/Callout/Chat tabs + notifications bell), and Reports Hub flip-to-live all verified. 31/31 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all new features working correctly.

issues: SolveBar button intercepts clicks on quick action buttons at bottom of screen - minor UX issue but core functionality works

critical_code_review_comments: Manager Workflow panel correctly implements 5 tabs with proper data-testids for all interactive elements
PTO approve/deny endpoints correctly push notifications to myecho_notifications collection
HR Config toggle for allow_mobile_callout correctly gates the callout form vs tap-to-call button in MyEcho
MoD Chat is WhatsApp-style with proper author attribution and timestamps
Reports Hub endpoints correctly flip from demo=true to demo=false when pos_rings collection has data
test_credentials: X-User-Id: demo-hourly-001 (employee), X-User-Id: manager-on-duty (manager), devAuth=1 for frontend
seed_data_creation: Created test PTO requests, shift swaps, callouts, and chat messages during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter249 features verified: (1) Manager Workflow desktop panel at sidebar 'Admin & System' > 'Manager Workflow' with 5 tabs - PTO Approvals (16 pending), Shift Swaps (1 pending), Call-Outs (1 pending), MoD Chat, HR Config. All tabs render correctly with approve/deny buttons, chat input/send, and config toggles. (2) MyEcho mobile at /m/me?devAuth=1 has new tabs - Swap (form with date/cover/note + MY SWAPS list), Call-out (shows tap-to-call when allow_mobile_callout=false, form when true), Chat (WhatsApp-style MoD chat). Notifications bell in top-right shows unread count. Quick action buttons on home (Swap/Call-out/Chat MoD) navigate to respective tabs. (3) Reports Hub endpoints (sales-by-profit-center, tender-mix, server-sales, hourly-heatmap) correctly read from pos_rings collection and return demo=false when data exists. (4) ECW mobile at /m/ecw?devAuth=1 shows docked RESV card (not floating banner) with cover count. (5) Install Hub at /install shows both Echo AURION and MyEcho Staff cards with QR codes.
